description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage. Add a job named testcases that runs in the test stage and executes the exact commands: apt-get update -qy, apt-get install -y python-dev python-pip, and pip install -r requirements.txt. Use the default Docker image (no custom image) and no services, caches, artifacts, or special rules. The pipeline does not define any variables or deployment targets.
